## Training a SUS2-MLIP model for diamond

* The train.cfg file comprise 200 sturctures generated by AEE-DAS (50-800K).
* The samples in valid.cfg were extracted from the AIMD trajectory at 1000K.

Run following command to train the SUS2-MLIP model:
```bash
mpirun -n 24 ../bin/mlp-sus2 train untrained.mtp train.cfg --trained-pot-name=fitted.mtp
```
Evaluate the model：
```bash
../bin/mlp-sus2 calc-errors fitted.mtp valid.cfg
```
